final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [5:0] count);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 6'b0;
        end else if (en) begin
            count <= count + 2;
        end
    end
endmodule
